name: vscode-mcp-bridge-ext
description: Bridges VS Code IDE features to AI coding agents via MCP

mcpServer.port.description: HTTP port for the MCP server

mcpServer.enableContextPush.description: Automatically push context updates (active file, selection, diagnostics) to connected agents

mcpServer.authToken.description: Bearer token required for HTTP connections (empty = no auth)

mcpServer.allowedCommands.description: VS Code commands allowed via execute_vscode_command tool (empty = none allowed)

mcpServer.terminalStrategy.description: How to run terminal commands. childProcess captures output reliably. shellIntegration shows in VS Code terminal (requires VS Code 1.93+)

mcpServer.serverHost.description: Host address for MCP server. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access, or 0.0.0.0 to allow external connections.

commands.title: VS Code MCP Bridge: Start Server
VS Code MCP Bridge: Stop Server
VS Code MCP Bridge: Restart Server
VS Code MCP Bridge: Copy Connection URL
VS Code MCP Bridge: Show Status / Options

scripts.update-imports: tsc scripts/update-imports.ts --outDir scripts --module Node16 --moduleResolution Node16 --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node scripts/update-imports.js && del scripts\update-imports.js
